articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Katy Perry, Blackpink's Lisa Among Rumoured Artists To Perform In Several Ceremonies - Report
articles.description: The upcoming FIFA World Cup 2026 is set to have three opening ceremonies in North America. Some of the musical artists lined up to perform include Katy Perry, Lisa, Michael Buble and Tyla.

articles.title: Raashii Khanna talks about playing Gurbani in Lukkhe, says 'Playing her was intense in ways I still can‚Äôt fully explain'
articles.description: Raashii Khanna is earning appreciation for her emotionally powerful performance in Lukkhe, where she plays the intense and layered character Gurbani. articles.title: Tanishaa recalls Aditya Chopra asking her to transform her body
articles.description: Tanishaa Mukerji, daughter of veteran actor Tanuja and sister of Bollywood star Kajol, recently opened up about the intense physical transformation she underwent for Neal 'n' Nikki and the health issues that followed. The actress, who starred opposite Uday Chopra in the 2005 film produced by Yash Raj Films, revealed that producer Aditya Chopra had asked her to get toned for the role. However, the strict routine she followed later resulted in a hormonal imbalance.

articles.title: Isha Ambani pays tribute to mother Nita Ambani at NMACC dinner in Venice
articles.description: Isha Ambani paid tribute to her mother Nita Ambani at the inaugural NMACC dinner in Venice. The event marked the opening of the India Pavilion at the 61st La Biennale di Venezia, where Isha spoke on her mother's journey and NMACC's mission.

articles.title: Nikkhil Advani‚Äôs Salaam-e-Ishq To Get A Sequel, Romantic Anthology Set To Become Franchise: Report

articles.title: 'We‚Äôre Not Done Yet': Dhurandhar Producer Breaks Silence On Dhurandhar 3 Rumours
articles.description:
Dhurandhar and Dhurandhar: The Revenge both turned out to be massive hits and played a big role in reviving Bollywood cinema. The films were praised from all corners, not just in India but even beyond, and performed extremely well at the box office. Now, there‚Äôs something new that has sparked excitement among fans.

The producer of the Dhurandhar franchise and Jio Studios‚Äô Jyoti Deshpande recently made a statement about another project under the same banner.

'Not Done With Dhurandhar Yet'

In a recent conversation with Bollywood Hungama, Jyoti Deshpande confirmed that there‚Äôs something in store for fans of Ranveer Singh and the Dhurandhar franchise.

She said, ‚ÄúWe‚Äôre not done with Dhurandhar yet. We‚Äôll hopefully have a surprise for the audience later this year. There‚Äôs something up our sleeves.‚ÄĚ

ALSO READ | The Batman Part II Begins Filming, Matt Reeves Teases Snowy Gotham In First Major Update

Her statement has left fans excited, with many now expecting a third part of the franchise.

Rakesh Bedi On Dhurandhar 3

However, actor Rakesh Bedi, who played Jameel Jamali in the film, has a different take. Speaking to Zoom, he said, ‚ÄúI don‚Äôt think a third part will happen. But Dhurandhar is a franchise, and it can be made with other actors at any point in time. The story ends with the spy going back to his nation.‚ÄĚ

Yami On Aditya

Yami Gautam, wife of director Aditya Dhar, shared that the success of the franchise hasn‚Äôt changed him as a person.

In a conversation with Grazia, she said, ‚ÄúNothing has changed us as people. That also comes from Aditya and the kind of person he is - very unaffected and extremely humble. I‚Äôve seen him through different phases, highs and lows, but we‚Äôve always stayed grounded.‚ÄĚ

ALSO READ | Jana Nayagan Likely to Hit Screens On Vijay‚Äôs Birthday, Weeks After He Won Tamil Nadu Election

She also added that both of them believe strongly in spirituality and feel that good things come at the right time.

While there is no official confirmation yet, the buzz around Dhurandhar continues to grow, and fans are now waiting to see what surprise the makers have planned next.

articles.title: Adnan Sami‚Äôs Emotional Tribute to Asha Bhosle
articles.description: Singer Adnan Sami paid a deeply emotional tribute to legendary playback icon Asha Bhosle, saying her soul and music will live forever. Recalling their special bond and musical journey, Sami praised her timeless voice and legacy that continues to inspire generations of music lovers across the world.

articles.title: 'Thaai Kizhavi' makers issue fraud alert, warn public against fake casting calls and audition scams
articles.description: The makers of Thaai Kizhavi have issued a public alert. They warn aspiring actors about fake casting calls and audition scams. The production team has not appointed any casting agents. They urge the public to ignore unofficial messages. Legal action will be taken against fraudsters misusing their name. This is a reminder for newcomers to stay vigilant.

articles.title: Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift drop massive hint about wedding plans during mysterious London date
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have reignited wedding speculation after being spotted leaving London restaurant Gymkhana hand in hand during a romantic dinner outing. Fans quickly pointed to their coordinated outfits and affectionate appearance as a massive hint about possible marriage plans. The buzz intensified following reports claiming the couple could tie the knot during Fourth of July weekend in New York City. Neither Swift nor Kelce has publicly confirmed engagement or wedding rumors so far.

articles.title: 5 stunning birds that visit India every summer
articles.description: India is home to a diverse range of birds found across the country. While some soar high in the sky, others dot the waterbodies.Wetlands and woodlands fill with excitement each year as birds fly in from distant lands during the summer. These feathered travelers chase better weather, plenty of food, and safe spots to nest and raise their young. From Africa's swamps to Europe's forests, they cross oceans and mountains, landing in places like Gujarat, Haryana, and Bengal.Spotting one of these feels magical and is a sign to witness nature's amazing cycles. Their trips remind us of how connected our world is, but also of how climate change and habitat loss put these journeys at risk.Here are some birds that can be spotted suring summers in India

articles.title: 4 Zodiac Signs Facing A Turning Point On 9th May 2026 - Are You The One?
articles.description: The horoscope tomorrow points to a day of steady but meaningful progress for four zodiac signs. Tomorrow‚Äôs horoscope highlights a practical cosmic mood where clarity, patience, and emotional maturity can create real momentum. The horoscope for tomorrow suggests that for these four signs, career choices, relationship conversations, and personal discipline could shape what comes next. This daily horoscope tomorrow is less about dramatic change and more about decisions that quietly define your next chapter.

articles.title: 'Bhooth Bangla' box office collection Day 21: Akshay Kumar starrer completes successful three-week run with Rs 234 crore haul

Over the last three weeks, the film has raked in a hefty Rs 150 crore net in India alone, pushing its total worldwide earnings to an impressive Rs 234.93 crore. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: Ted Turner, the man who made ‚ÄĒ and changed ‚ÄĒ the news
articles.description: His legacy is defined by what he achieved with Cable News Network (CNN), the first 24-hour news channel, established in 1980. Initially derided as ‚ÄúChicken Noodle Network‚ÄĚ by critics, the channel proved its worth when the Gulf War broke out in 1990 by broadcasting the conflict live.
